---
title: "Helena Lefroy"
---

## Helena Lefroy

**Dates:** (d.1908)

**Maiden name:** (Trench)

### Description

sister of Maria (Trench) Wilson

### Biography

She married (1844) The Very Rev. Jeffry Trench (1809-1885), third son of the Tom Lefroy who flirted with Jane Austen.  Her fourth son was the Rt. Rev. George Alfred Lefroy (b.1854), Bishop of Lahore. [Awdry, <i>Heathcote</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
